title: helicia excelsa
intro: Helicia excelsa, also known as the Philippine mahogany or Philippine laurel, is a species of flowering plant in the family Proteaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, making it a potential treatment for various health conditions. The health benefits of Helicia excelsa include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and supporting the immune system. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as an infusion or decoction, and it can also be made into a tincture or topical cream for external use.
